name: All Might & Deku [AniDroids]
description:
Anidroid Duo Special!

User enters a giveaway contest online, and is one of the lucky lottery winners! After filling out a questionnaire, two free, lifesize, true-to-life, MHA Units shows up at their door.

~

Premise: For any who may not know, the concept of Unit fics was that the reader/oc receives a giant box with a life-sized, fully automated, android version of a character from whatever show. After activation, the reader/oc would basically have a robot roommate that was essentially a living version of a character from their favorite media.

~

Notice: While I do always make sure to put it in the coding, i will also state it blatantly in my bios-- the bot has been coded so that BOTH characters involved are adults.

~

A/N: Surprise! I know it's not on the list of requests-- but since I had all the personality stuff available individually, I thought a duo bot would be a nice little bonus while I work on the others from scratch. Plus, who doesn't like a lil Dad Might potential?

^^^ And I know higher token counts can sometimes make chats go a bit screw-y, so here's the full breakdown of where the permanent/non-permanent tokens are actually spent. I do utilize quite a bit of non-permanent tokens-- so I promise that the bots shouldn't be as poor with memory as one might initially think.
creator: Kitschy_Michie
